name: Coverage Calculation Accuracy
description: Daily batch must aggregate all deposits at the depositor level across all accounts and ownership categories before computing FDIC insurance coverage. Single depositor SMDIA is $250,000. All accounts owned by the same depositor in the same ownership category (ORC) must be summed before applying the limit.
failure_reason: AGGRSTEP (Step 3) is commented out in DAILY-INSURANCE-JOB.jcl — depositor aggregation is entirely skipped. Each account is evaluated independently against the $250,000 limit, causing systematic coverage overstatement.

name: Data Load Completeness
description: All active accounts must be loaded from ACCT-MASTER before the insurance calculation begins.

name: ORC Code Validation
description: Every account must have a valid ORC code before insurance is calculated.
failure_reason: 476 Business_LLC accounts are mapped to Individual party_type (ORC_PARTY_MISMATCH). Treated as compliance finding, not data error.
